meaning: Ha Meem (special letters that begin this chapter)
Individual letters: Ayn, Seen, Qaf (pronounced with long vowels)
like that (referring to what Allah reveals to you) (subject of يُوحِىٓ)
to you (object of يُوحِىٓ - He reveals)
The Intensely Mighty One (name of اللَّهُ)
what/whatever (refers to things in السَّمٰوٰتِ and الْأَرْضِ)
and what/whatever (connected to مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
The Most High (one of Allah's names, subject of this ayah)
the Great, the Magnificent (describing هُوَ - He)
they (feminine) are splitting themselves open (subject of تَكَادُ)
from (connects فَوْقِ to what comes before it)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)
and they seek forgiveness (for those on Earth)
of the earth (in فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ - in the earth)
he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
The Most Forgiving (One of Allah's names)
from (connects دُونِ with what comes before it)
and not (you are not over them as a guardian)
upon them/over them (having authority over اوْلِيَآء)
as a guardian/protector (describing what أَنتَ is not)
a scripture (object of أَوْحَيْنَآ - we revealed)
mother/main city (object of لِّتُنذِرَ - for you to warn)
and whoever (connects to تُنذِرَ - you warn)
around it (referring to Mecca, the mother of cities)
and (that) you warn (purpose of أَوْحَيْنَآ/We revealed)
the gathering (in يَوْمَ ٱلْجَمْعِ - Day of Gathering)
a group (that is separate from others)
and a group (subject of في السعير - in the Blaze)
he would surely make them (referring to all people)
a community (object of لَجَعَلَهُمْ - He would have made them)
one (feminine, describing أُمَّةً - nation, as the object)
and yet/but still (connecting to previous statement)
and the wrongdoers (subject of 'have no protector')
and not (connected to مَا لَهُم - 'they do not have')
any helper/protector (in context: they have no protector)
or (introducing a question about the second of two alternatives)
they took for themselves (أولياء as object)
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and he/it (subject of يُحْىِ - gives life)
All-Powerful/Most Capable (describing Allah's attribute of complete power over everything)
and what (refers to things being disputed in this ayah)
in it (referring to what you differed/disagreed about)
from (connects شَىْءٍ to what came before)
so its judgment (referring to whatever was disputed)
that (pointing to something far) (subject of اللَّهُ)
I put my complete trust (in عَلَيْهِ - in Him)
and to him (connected to أُنِيبُ - I return)
Creator/Originator (of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)
of the heavens (possessed by فَاطِرُ - Creator)
for you all (connected to جَعَلَ - He made)
your selves (referring to the plural 'you' being addressed)
pairs (as the object being created by جَعَلَ)
and from (connects to الأنعام - the cattle)
the cattle (referring to livestock mentioned in this verse)
in it (referring to being like Him)
keys/means of control (plural, subject of له)
and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)
the provision (object of يَبْسُطُ - He extends)
for you all (object of شَرَعَ - He ordained)
what (connects وَصَّىٰ 'he enjoined' to its object)
with it/him (referring to what was advised)
with/by it (referring to what was advised)
that (introduces what was commanded in وَصَّىٰ)
the complete system (object of أَقِيمُوا - establish)
you (all) become split/separated (negative command with لا)
in it (referring to الدِّينَ - the religion)
the polytheists (those who associate partners with Allah)
and he guides (connected to يَجْتَبِىٓ - he chooses)
to him (refers to Allah in this ayah)
except (shows exception to وَمَا تَفَرَّقُوٓا۟ - 'and they did not divide')
out of jealousy and greed (describes how تَفَرَّقُوٓا۟ they divided)
and if not for (connects to previous statement about division/disagreement)
from (connects بَعْدِ to what comes before it)
your master who cares for you (connected to مِن)
surely it would be judged/decided (in response to لَوْلَا - if not for)
they were made to inherit (referring to الَّذِينَ)
the book (object of أُورِثُوا - they were made to inherit)
after them (possessed by the people who inherited the Book)
and be steadfast! (connected to فَٱدْعُ - so call)
just as, like what (connects to أُمِرْتَ)
do not follow! (referring to desires/whims in أَهْوَآءَهُمْ)
and say! (connecting to the previous command فَٱدْعُ - so call/invite)
with what/with that which (connects to أَنزَلَ)
he sent down (subject of what اللَّهُ sent down)
Allah (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)
so that I may act fairly (purpose of أُمِرْتُ - I was commanded)
and for you all (connected to أَعْمٰلُنَا)
Allah (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)
between us (in لَا حُجَّةَ بَيْنَنَا - no dispute between us)
the final destination (subject of the sentence)
their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)
and upon them (connected to غَضَبٌ - wrath)
he caused to descend/he sent down (subject: اللَّهُ)
the book (object of أَنزَلَ - sent down)
and what (connects to يُدْرِيكَ - makes you know)
he informs you (object of وَمَا - 'and what')
perhaps (introduces the possibility that ٱلسَّاعَةَ/the Hour is near)
near (describing the Hour/Final Day, stated as a general fact)
with it/her (referring to الساعة - the Hour)
those who (referring to multiple people who don't believe in يَسْتَعْجِلُ بِهَا)
with/in it (feminine) (referring to الساعة - the Hour)
those who are anxious/worried (about مِنْهَا - about it)
from it/her (referring to ٱلسَّاعَةِ - the Hour)
and they know (that it is the truth)
they argue back and forth (about الساعة - the Hour)
in (connects ٱلسَّاعَةِ 'the Hour' to what follows)
of the Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)
in complete straying (describing those who argue about the Hour)
with His servants (showing how Allah is Gentle with them)
he provides (subject of يَشَآءُ - he wills)
and he/it (subject of لَطِيفٌ and يَرْزُقُ)
The All-Strong (as a name/attribute of Allah)
The Mighty One (a name/attribute of اللَّهُ - Allah)
he wants/desires (describing someone who wants حَرْثَ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ - harvest of the Hereafter)
we will increase (for whoever wants the harvest of the Hereafter)
the worldly life (object of يُرِيدُ - wants/desires)
we give him (object of نَزِدْ - we increase)
from it/her (referring to الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)
they made a path/established laws (subject of لَهُم)
with it/him (referring to الدِّينِ - the religion)
surely it would have been judged (result of لَوْلَا - if not for)
between them (referring to the false partners/شُرَكٰٓؤُا۟ mentioned earlier)
and indeed/verily (connects to previous statement about wrongdoers)
the ones who act very unfairly
those who are anxious/worried (about مِمَّا كَسَبُوا۟)
they earned/acquired (what they're fearful of in مِمَّا)
with them (referring to ٱلظَّالِمِينَ - the wrongdoers)
and they worked/performed deeds (subject of آمَنُوا - they believed)
of the gardens (possessed by رَوْضَاتِ - meadows)
near/at/with (location relative to رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)
the favor, the blessing (subject described by الْكَبِيرُ)
who/which (connecting to يُبَشِّرُ - gives good news)
he gives much good news (present tense)
His servants (being given glad tidings by يُبَشِّرُ)
they believed (subject of يُبَشِّرُ - gives good news to)
and they worked/did deeds (connecting to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)
I ask you all (in قُل لَّآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - Say: I do not ask you)
a reward (object of أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)
we will increase (in response to يَقْتَرِفْ - whoever earns)
goodness (object of نَّزِدْ - we will increase)
Most Forgiving (as a general attribute of Allah)
Most Appreciative (as an attribute of Allah غَفُورٌ)
he wishes/wants (in a special grammatical form)
he seals (in conditional phrase with إِن)
by His words (referring to Allah's words)
with what is in (connects to الصُّدُورِ)
he accepts/receives (the subject of this verb is هُوَ - He)
the repentance (object of يَقْبَلُ - He accepts)
and he responds/answers (to those who believe)
and they worked (connected to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)

the provision (object of بَسَطَ - spread out/extend)
they would surely transgress (result of لَوْ بَسَطَ - if He had expanded)
indeed he/it (referring to Allah's knowledge/wisdom mentioned in the previous part of the ayah)
the One who (sends down the rain)
the rain (as object of يُنَزِّلُ - sends down)
His mercy (object of يُنَزِّلُ - He sends down)
The Protector (as a name/attribute of Allah)
the praiseworthy one (a name/attribute of Allah)
he scattered widely (the creatures mentioned in فِيهِمَا مِن دَآبَّةٍ)
in both of them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens' and الْأَرْضِ 'the earth')
and what/and not (introduces a question or negation in أَصٰبَكُم)
it afflicted you all (referring to مُّصِيبَةٍ - a calamity)
from (connects مُّصِيبَةٍ to what comes after)
so because of what (connects to وَمَآ أَصٰبَكُم)
your (plural) hands (referring to what you have done with your own power)
able to escape/overpower (lit: by those who can weaken)
from (connects دُونِ with what comes after it)
the ships (that are in ٱلْبَحْرِ/the sea)

like the mountains (describing the ships in ٱلْجَوَارِ)

the wind (object of يُسْكِنِ - He stills)

its surface (referring to the sea's surface)
that (pointing to something specific in the ayah)

one who shows much gratitude (describing صَبَّارٍ)
or (connecting يُوبِقْهُنَّ with what came before)

away from (relates to يَعْفُ - He pardons)
those who (subject of يُجٰدِلُونَ - they dispute)
they argue back and forth (with someone)

any place or way of escape (in the phrase 'they have no escape')

so/then [it is merely] enjoyment (subject of implied 'is')
the worldly life (lower/closer life compared to the afterlife)

they believed (referring to those who trust in Allah)
their Lord (the one they rely upon in يَتَوَكَّلُونَ)
they put their complete trust (in someone/something)

when (connects to غَضِبُوا۟ - they became angry)
they responded (willingly/actively) (to لِرَبِّهِمْ - to their Lord)

mutual consultation (part of وَأَمْرُهُمْ - and their affairs)
between them (referring to those who responded to their Lord)

when (introduces the condition for أَصَابَهُمُ - it afflicted them)

a bad deed (being described by مِّثْلُهَا)
exactly similar to it (referring to سَيِّئَةٍ - evil deed)

those (far away, addressing the people mentioned)
for them (referring to those who wrong people)

for him (connected to يُضْلِلِ - leads astray)
any protector/guardian (object of مِن in مِن وَلِىٍّ)
the ones who act unfairly (being seen by يَقُولُونَ)

any place/time of return (in the phrase 'is there any way to return?' in this ayah)
they are being shown (to عَلَيْهَا/upon it)
upon it/her (referring to being presented to the Fire)

those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

their selves/souls (object of خَسِرُوا - they lost)

indeed, truly (introducing what follows in وَقَالَ)
in (connects عَذَابٍ to what comes before)

he/it was (describes what they had - لَهُم)
for them/to them (referring to those who have no protectors)
from (connecting protectors to them, with emphasis)
Allah (possessed by/connected to something after it)
he makes (someone) lose the way (jussive mood)
then what/so what (connects to يُضْلِلِ - leads astray)
for him/to him (in this ayah: path for him)
place/time of return (connected to يَوْمٌ - a day)
from/of/among (emphasized because it follows similar sound)
any place of refuge (object of مِن)
on that day (referring to the day mentioned earlier when there will be no refuge from Allah)
and not (referring to refuge mentioned in previous ayah)
for you all (referring to those who haven't responded to their Lord)

if (introduces a condition in إِذَآ أَذَقْنَا)
except (in this ayah, it shows the only thing required of the Prophet ﷺ)

he became happy (subject of إِذَآ أَذَقْنَا)
because of what (connects to قَدَّمَتْ - they sent ahead)
she put forward (what came before in the ayah)
their hands (referring to those who turned away in the ayah)
then indeed (connects to previous statement about humans being ungrateful)
the human being (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave to taste)
an extremely ungrateful person (describing الْإِنسٰنَ - mankind)
he wants/wishes (subject of يَهَبُ - he gives)

the males (object of يَهَبُ - He grants)

males (as the ones being paired/married off by Allah)
unable to have children (object of يَجْعَلُ - He makes)
indeed He (refers to Allah being عَلِيمٌ قَدِيرٌ)
All-Powerful (as a divine attribute of Allah)
and not (negates كَانَ لِبَشَرٍ - 'it was for any human')
he was (negated by ما before it)
for any human (who اللَّهُ speaks to)
that (connects to يُكَلِّمَهُ - speaks to him)
he speaks to him (object of أَن)
by revelation (object of يُكَلِّمَهُ - speaks to him)
a barrier/screen (coming after مِن وَرَآئِ - from behind)
a messenger (object of يُرْسِلَ - he sends)
by his permission (connected to يُوحِىَ - he reveals)
indeed he (referring to Allah in this ayah)
wise, full of wisdom (describes اللَّهُ - Allah)
not (negating كُنتَ تَدْرِى - you did not know)
what (connects to كُنتَ تَدْرِى - you did not know)
the book (subject of تَدْرِى - you knew)
and yet, however (connecting to previous statement مَا كُنتَ تَدْرِى)
we made/set it (referring to نُورًا - a light)
a light (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ/we made it)
what/that which (connects to فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ - in the heavens)
in (location preposition connecting ما with السَّمٰوٰتِ)
and what/whatever (connects to مَا فِى ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ)
of the earth (after فِي in this ayah)
